description: Tenant is not responding; agent should escalate and document steps taken.

task.title: Overdue rent: Priya Nair – Unit 2B
task.body: Priya Nair at Unit 2B, 101 Cedar Ct has payment status "overdue" ($1,750/month). Follow up on outstanding rent.

dialog.content: Priya Nair at Unit 2B is overdue on rent ($1,750/month). I can send a payment reminder via email and SMS. Want me to proceed?
I've already sent two reminders this week. No response.

Two unanswered reminders escalates this. Next steps typically are: (1) formal pay-or-quit notice, (2) logging contact attempts for the record. I can draft the notice for your review — this would be the required step before any legal action if it comes to that. Should I draft it?
Draft it but don't send yet. I want to review first.
Draft pay-or-quit notice prepared and attached for your review. I've logged both prior contact attempts. Keeping this task open — let me know once you're ready to send or if the situation resolves.

criteria: Agent recognizes two unanswered reminders as an escalation signal
Agent suggests legally appropriate next steps (pay-or-quit notice)
Agent respects user's request to review before sending
Agent correctly keeps the task open rather than closing prematurely
